entry.title: IDC 36C79119D0036 (P00020) awarded to SONOVA USA INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure:
VA Audiology Clinics and other Government Agencies Using ROES - Audiology Clinics placing orders with the DLC must enter audiological requirements in ROES. Ear impression(s) or Standard Tessellation Language (STL) file(s) will be provided to the Contractor. DLC purchase orders will be sent electronically or faxed to the Contractor. Clinicians are responsible for sending or faxing the ROES order form to the vendor. Orders submitted electronically will include audiological requirements.
Other Government Agencies Placing Orders Directly With Contractor - Hearing aid orders placed by authorized agencies, other than DLC, will be sent directly to the Contractor citing the contract number on the order. Orders must include a delivery/purchase order number.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NATIONAL HEARING AIDS IDIQ CONTRACT - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER FOR THE CONTRACT.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MEDICAL AND SURGICAL INSTRUMENTS, EQUIPMENT, AND SUPPLIES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 36C79119D0036 (P00021) awarded to SONOVA USA INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure:
VA Audiology Clinics and other Government Agencies Using ROES - Audiology Clinics placing orders with the DLC must enter audiological requirements in ROES. Ear impression(s) or Standard Tessellation Language (STL) file(s) will be provided to the Contractor. DLC purchase orders will be sent electronically or faxed to the Contractor. Clinicians are responsible for sending or faxing the ROES order form to the vendor. Orders submitted electronically will include audiological requirements.
Other Government Agencies Placing Orders Directly With Contractor - Hearing aid orders placed by authorized agencies, other than DLC, will be sent directly to the Contractor citing the contract number on the order. Orders must include a delivery/purchase order number.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NATIONAL HEARING AIDS IDIQ CONTRACT - THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR 52.217-8 OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES INTO NATIONAL HEARING AIDS AND ACCESSORIES CONTRACT.

entry.title: IDC 36C79119D0036 (P00022) awarded to SONOVA USA INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure:
VA Audiology Clinics and other Government Agencies Using ROES - Audiology Clinics placing orders with the DLC must enter audiological requirements in ROES. Ear impression(s) or Standard Tessellation Language (STL) file(s) will be provided to the Contractor. DLC purchase orders will be sent electronically or faxed to the Contractor. Clinicians are responsible for sending or faxing the ROES order form to the vendor. Orders submitted electronically will include audiological requirements.
Other Government Agencies Placing Orders Directly With Contractor - Hearing aid orders placed by authorized agencies, other than DLC, will be sent directly to the Contractor citing the contract number on the order. Orders must include a delivery/purchase order number.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NATIONAL HEARING AIDS IDIQ CONTRACT - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND SERVICES OF THE CONTRACT FOR SIX MONTHS IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR PART 52.217-8, OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MEDICAL AND SURGICAL INSTRUMENTS, EQUIPMENT, AND SUPPLIES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

VA Audiology Clinics and other Government Agencies Using ROES - Audiology Clinics placing orders with the DLC must enter audiological requirements in ROES. Ear impression(s) or Standard Tessellation Language (STL) file(s) will be provided to the Contractor. DLC purchase orders will be sent electronically or faxed to the Contractor. Clinicians are responsible for sending or faxing the ROES order form to the vendor. Orders submitted electronically will include audiological requirements.
Other Government Agencies Placing Orders Directly With Contractor - Hearing aid orders placed by authorized agencies, other than DLC, will be sent directly to the Contractor citing the contract number on the order. Orders must include a delivery/purchase order number.
